article_meta.title: Cartoon Carousel The nation’s cartoonists on the week in politics Every week political cartoonists throughout the countr

reasoning: Classification direction and magnitude are appropriate (clearly critical of McCarthyism and modern right) with high-but-reasonable confidence. Evidence is mostly grounded in the author’s framing and adjectives, though some indicators are vague and it briefly references outlet reputation.

custom_reasoning.classification_accuracy: Article’s own prose strongly criticizes McCarthyism and links it to contemporary right-wing politics; Lean Left is correct or at worst one step from Left.
custom_reasoning.confidence_calibration: Bias signals are explicit and sustained; 0.85 is appropriate for a clearly opinionated piece.
custom_reasoning.reasoning_evidence_quality: Cites authorial framing (e.g., tying to Trump ‘authoritarian’ style, ‘hard‑knuckled tactics’), but several indicators are generalized rather than quoting specific phrases and it mentions outlet reputation.
